arts.ttl: 'I'm a huge fan': Darren Bent says whether he thinks Harry Kane would sign for Arsenal this summer
arts.sum: Harry Kane has been in the headlines this week amid reports he could leave Bayern Munich. Indeed, it has emerged that Kane has a release...

arts.ttl: 'There you are...' Frank McAvennie predicts Celtic vs Bayern Munich Champions League clash
arts.sum: Ahead of the heavyweight encounter, Frank McAvennie and Alan McInally discussed the game, their prediction and what Bayern Munich are going to be ‘unaware’ of. Frank McAvennie backs Celtic to beat Bayern Munich in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Matt O'Riley meets post Celtic turbulence head on as Brighton star reveals major reason behind £30m transfer
arts.sum: The former Hoops hero has endured a difficult start to life in the Premier League amid a stop-start season

arts.ttl: Comeback Kid: Bayern Munich’s Hiroki Itō travels to Celtic, nearing big return to action
arts.sum: One of the surprise inclusions on Bayern Munich ’s travel list to Scotland was Hiroki Itō, the hard-luck defender, who has been injured for most of the season. The impression in training has been good, but I can’t organise a last-minute friendly for them,” said Kompany (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Celtic kids fall to dramatic penalty shootout loss in UEFA Youth League
arts.sum: Celtic's youngsters fell to a penalty shootout loss in the UEFA Youth League this afternoon.

arts.ttl: Green Brigade rally Celtic fans for Bayern Munich showdown - But UEFA watches closely
arts.sum: The Green Brigade have issued a plea to Celtic supporters ahead of tonight’s Champions League match at Parkhead.

arts.ttl: Kasper Schmeichel holds unwanted Harry Kane record as Celtic goalkeeper faces Bayern Munich star striker in Champions League
arts.sum: Harry Kane goal scoring record vs goalkeepers (Opta via the Times ) vs Kasper Schmeichel – 18 goals vs Jordan Pickford – 14 goals vs Nick Pope – 9 goals vs Ben Foster – 7 goals vs Dubravka, Nubel, Leno, Boruc, Guaita – 6 goals Celtic hope to shut down Kane in Champions League

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham Hotspur could be in lead to land Bayern Munich star Leroy Sané
arts.sum: According to a report from CaughtOffside reporter Mark Brus, Tottenham Hotspur could be the frontrunner to land Bayern Munich free agent Leroy Sané: Sané now looks highly likely to become a free agent this summer, and Tottenham have been joined by Barcelona in showing an interest in the 29-year-old.

arts.ttl: Celtic Park singer Liam McGrandles pulls plug on Bayern Munich gig after toxic abuse from fellow fans
arts.sum: The Irish Folk singer was pencilled in to play some pre-match tunes ahead of tonight's Champions League clash at Parkhead

arts.ttl: Steven Gerrard returning to Rangers lacks Brendan Rodgers Celtic ingredient as ex Ibrox star doubts fans appetite
arts.sum: Danny Wilson isn't sure Gerrard's record since leaving Gers would have fans enthused about a second spell
